title: The location of six geometric figures (clustered irregular knot)

rule.instruction: The location of six geometric figures. (The specific locations are determined by the drafter.)

restrictions: Last of the located-figures genre (#237/#238), reviewed with the user. Chosen: figures = IRREGULAR ANGULAR POLYGONS (hand-built, asymmetric, not tidy regular polygons; 5-8 jittered vertices, strongly varied radii) via the new `locatedFigures` figure=irregular; composition = CLUSTERED WITH OPEN SPACE (the new `cluster` param groups the six figures into an asymmetric dense knot, leaving open wall around, Klee #7) with dense location webs reaching out across the negative space to the frame corners. Applying R16/R17: dense webs (the web is the subject), no light/minimal, no 'balanced' hedge — every design commits to a strong idea. Monochrome; every line not-straight; density capped for the paper-rip limit. The 16 span cluster tightness, knot position, figure size (incl. big/small contrast), web richness, anchor reach, and hand energy.
